summary: Add operator session management for teacher assignment and participant additions. This phase completes the create-first workflow opened in phase 6 and ships in the same release bundle.

steps.name: session-management-service
steps.summary: Completed organization-scoped session management services for session metadata, approved teachers, available participants, and snapshot-level attendance state.

steps.name: session-teacher-action
steps.summary: Completed session-level teacher assignment actions, including nullable teacher clearing and approved-teacher-only enforcement within organization scope.

steps.name: session-participant-action
steps.summary: Completed post-creation participant management so operators can attach existing participants or create new roster entries and add them to session snapshots without backfilling attendance.

steps.name: session-management-ui
steps.summary: Completed the operator session management route and tightened the direct UI path from records detail into `/dashboard/sessions/[sessionId]` alongside the existing dashboard and records browser links.

steps.name: session-management-regression
steps.summary: Extended regression coverage for nullable teacher clearing and operator navigation so the phase 6 create-first workflow remains completable through the new phase 7 surface.
